game.welcome: **** Welcome to 1984: Eyes of the State ****

verb.help: Move from the current location in the compass direction specified or Up or Down
Redescribe the current location LOOK UP [adjective] <noun> IN [adjective] <noun>; look something up in an index for example
ATTACK <npc> [WITH [adjective] <noun>]; Attack an NPC optionally with a weapon, if no WITH is specified then you throw a punch
EXAM [adjective] <noun>; Show a more detailed description of an item (either in a location or a carried item). Use EXAM ALL to examine everything in the current location
INV; List items you are carrying
TAKE [adjective] <noun>; GET|TAKE an item from the current location. Use GET|TAKE ALL to pick up all objects from the current location
DROP [adjective] <noun>; leave an item in the current location
PUT [adjective] <noun>; IN|INTO|ON [adjective] <container>; PUT an item in or into a container such as a cupboard or on a chair, etc
SELL [adjective] <noun> TO <npc>; Sell an item to an NPC
SWAP [adjective] <noun> FOR [adjective] <noun>; Ask an NPC to swap something you're carrying for something they possess
BUY [adjective] <noun> [FROM <npc>]; Buy an offered item from an NPC
WAIT mm; WAIT for the specified number of minutes or WAIT UNTIL hh:mm; WAIT UNTIL the specified time
TIME; show the current in-game time
SAVE "<filename>"; save your current game progress
LOAD "<filename>"; load a previously saved game
QUIT; quit and start again
HELP; show this message
ATTACH [adjective] <noun> TO [adjective] <noun>; Attach a carried item to another object
CALL <npc>; CALL an NPC. Attract their attention? More for inanimate objects like LIFTS that may be modelled as an NPC
CLOSE [adjective] <noun>; close a door or a container such as a drawer or a cupboard
COMPARE [adjective] <noun> WITH|AGAINST [adjective] <noun>; compare one thing against another
DETACH [adjective] <noun> FROM [adjective] <noun>; Detach an item from another object
GIVE [adjective] <noun> TO <npc>; Give an item to an NPC
JEMMY [adjective] <noun> WITH|USING [adjective] <noun>; Jemmy or smash something open (e.g. lock, window, door)
LOCK [adjective] <noun> WITH [adjective] <noun>; e.g. LOCK STEEL DOOR WITH GOLD KEY
OPEN [adjective] <noun>; e.g. open a door or a container such as a drawer or a cupboard
PAY <npc>; PAY an NPC. The amount to pay should be clear from the context so you don't need to specify the amount
PICK [adjective] <noun> WITH|USING [adjective] <noun> PICK a lock etc PICK UP [adjective] <noun>; Another synonym for GET|TAKE
PLUG [adjective] <noun>; INTO [adjective] <noun>; A synonym for ATTACH
PRESS [adjective] <noun>; Press on an object, e.g. Press the button to call a lift
RUN somewhere instead of walking, reduces the time taken to get to a destination. Use RUN <compass direction>
SAY "<quoted text>"; Say something, e.g. a password (SAY TO is not supported yet).
SHOW [adjective] <noun> TO <npc>; Show a carried item to an NPC
SWITCH ON|OFF [adjective] <noun>; SWITCH an object ON or OFF
THROW [adjective] <noun> AT [adjective] <noun>; THROW a carried item AT another object
UNLOCK [adjective] <noun> WITH|USING [adjective] <noun>; for example UNLOCK DOOR USING KEY
UNBLOCK [adjective] <noun> WITH|USING [adjective] <noun>; UNBLOCK something, e.g. a drain USING an implement
UNBOLT [adjective] <noun>; UNBOLT a door or window
UNPLUG [adjective] <noun> FROM [adjective] <noun>; UNPLUG an item FROM an object
